title: Context-size affordances lane
goal: Implement issues #565, #566, and #567 so context-size improvement signals are cheaper to act on and external-work promotion is less manual.
non_goals: Do not perform broad CLI or package installer extraction in this slice.
Do not make shipped code depend on GitHub, Codex, or this repository.

intent.outcome: Reduce context overhead in improvement intake by separating regenerable cache residue from source refactor signals, adding action routing to large-file hotspots, and exposing a provider-agnostic external-work promotion affordance.
intent.constraints: Use existing report/summary/planning surfaces; prefer compact action metadata over new commands.
intent.latitude: Choose field names and test placement that fit current report contracts.
intent.escalation: Stop before adding a new top-level command or attempting broad file decomposition.

execution.next_step: No further lane work remains; this plan is archived as proof.
execution.proof: Use agentic-workspace proof for changed paths, targeted pytest, ruff, planning doctor, and make check before closeout.

touched: tests for workspace report and planning summary surfaces
invariants: Regenerable local caches must not become repo-directed refactor candidates.
Large-file signals should route to compact next actions instead of requiring broad file reads.
External tracker details remain provider-agnostic after ingestion.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.

required_continuation.activation trigger: new context-size friction or validation regression

immediate_next_action: None; the lane is complete and archived.
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q
uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning
completion_criteria: #565, #566, and #567 are implemented or explicitly routed with proof.
Planning summary returns to idle with no active lane once complete.

execution_run.handoff source: dogfooding context-size findings promoted to issues #565-#567
execution_run.what happened: Created issues #565, #566, and #567; implemented regenerable-cache filtering, context-aware large-file hotspot action metadata, and provider-neutral external-work promotion actions.
execution_run.scope touched: .agentic-workspace planning state; src/agentic_workspace report and CLI assembly; packages/planning intent reconciliation; focused tests
execution_run.changed surfaces: active planning state, repo_friction/improvement_intake report fields, external_work_reconciliation fields, tests
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section improvement_intake --format json; uv run agentic-workspace external-intent refresh-github --format json; uv run pytest focused workspace/planning tests -q; uv run ruff check focused files; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; make check
execution_run.result for continuation: No continuation remains for #565, #566, or #567; all three issues are closed.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; the slice reshaped existing report and planning outputs without adding a first-line command.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; cache bulk is no longer promoted as refactor work, large-file candidates carry action routing, and external-work promotion has a compact provider-neutral affordance.
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; workspace report action commands honor resolved CLI invocation where local config applies.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: no active follow-on from this lane

proof_report.validation proof: selected proof and make check passed
proof_report.proof achieved now: #565 regenerable cache filtering, #566 context-aware hotspot actions, and #567 external-work promotion action implemented.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Create issues for context-size findings and implement them.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #565, #566, and #567 were created, implemented, validated, and closed.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: all new issues were implemented, validated, and closed
closure_check.reopen trigger: new context-size friction or validation failure

durable_residue.learned constraint: Context-size findings should be routed through compact action metadata before broad refactor lanes.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Avoid sending agents into huge files or regenerable caches when the package can identify the cheaper action.
durable_residue.canonical owner now: implemented report and planning output behavior in commit 9eeab4a

execution_summary.validation confirmed: make check passed after selected proof.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): behavior encoded in report/planning outputs and tests
